name: Staked FDRY
description: Claim on the Foundry FDRY staking vault on Solana. 1 stFDRY = 1 FDRY at launch; NAV rises as product revenue buys back and deposits FDRY. Chain-level FDRY-only ingress via Voltr. Forging the tools to compete with giants.

attributes.value: Pure custody — no rebalancing, no adaptors
